pathAssistantSteps.info:
• Collect and verify the Company Name to identify the customer or organization accurately.
  • Confirm the CIN is a valid 21-character code issued by the Registrar of Companies in India.
  • Record the Estimated Budget to assess the potential deal size and feasibility.
  • Capture key Requirements or Notes to document the customer’s needs and preferences.
  • Confirm the Planning to Buy timeline to schedule appropriate follow-up actions.
  • Continue engaging with the lead to strengthen the relationship and move toward conversion.

• Record the Reason for not converting the lead clearly and accurately.
  • Capture any customer feedback or obstacles that prevented conversion.
  • Share insights with the team to refine future lead qualification efforts.
  • Ensure the lead is properly closed or recycled for future engagement if applicable.

• Verify the Lead Name, Mobile, and Email Address are accurate and complete for effective communication.
  • Select the appropriate Product Family and Product Subcategory to capture the lead’s Product of interest.
  • Begin initial engagement to understand the lead’s requirements and potential.
